sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108842" key="u(ponefeli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπονεφελ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n108842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be clouded</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turbid,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">625</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
